results.definition_en: The time when the sun is up, from morning to night; or 24 hours.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 一天、白天；日出至日落，或 24 小時。
results.example_en: What day is it today?

results.definition_en: The end of the life of a person, animal, or plant.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 死亡、逝世；生命的結束。
results.example_en: Death came to the old man in the night.

results.definition_en: Money that one person must pay back to another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 債、債務；欠他人並須償還的金錢。
results.example_en: He paid off his debt last week.

results.definition_en: The choice one makes between two or more things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 決定、抉擇；於多項中做出選擇。
results.example_en: The decision was hard for her.
results.example_zh_tw: 這個決定對她來說很難。

results.definition_en: A step or stage on a scale; or a unit for measuring heat.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 程度、等級；或量測熱度的單位。
results.example_en: It is twenty degrees outside today.

results.definition_en: A picture or plan made before a thing is built.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 設計、圖樣；製作前的圖稿或計畫。
results.example_en: I like the design of her new dress.
results.example_zh_tw: 我喜歡她那件新洋裝的設計。

results.definition_en: A strong feeling of wanting something.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 渴望、慾望；強烈想要的感覺。
results.example_en: He has a great desire to learn.

results.definition_en: The act of breaking a thing so it is no more.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 破壞、毀滅；徹底毀壞使其不再存在。
results.example_en: The fire caused great destruction.
results.example_zh_tw: 那場火造成了極大的破壞。

results.definition_en: A small part of a bigger thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 細節、細部；整體中的小部分。
results.example_en: Tell me every detail of the story.
results.example_zh_tw: 把故事的每個細節告訴我。

results.definition_en: The act or process of growing or getting better.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 發展、成長；逐漸壯大或進步的過程。
results.example_en: The development of the city is fast.

results.definition_en: The work the body does to break down food after eating.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 消化；身體分解食物的過程。
results.example_en: A walk after a meal helps digestion.

results.definition_en: The way a thing or person is moving or facing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 方向；移動或面對的方位。
results.example_en: Which direction is the school?

results.definition_en: The finding of something new or not known before.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 發現；首次找到或得知的事物。
results.example_en: The discovery of gold made the town rich.
results.example_zh_tw: 黃金的發現讓那座鎮富了起來。

results.definition_en: A talk between people about a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 討論、商議；針對某事的交談。
results.example_en: We had a long discussion about the plan.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們就那項計畫討論了很久。

results.definition_en: A sickness that makes the body or mind not well.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 疾病；使身心不適的病症。
results.example_en: He is in hospital with a serious disease.

results.definition_en: A strong bad feeling about a thing that one does not like.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 厭惡、反感；對不喜歡之事物的強烈感覺。
results.example_en: She looked at the food with disgust.

results.definition_en: The space between two places or things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 距離；兩地或兩物之間的空間。
results.example_en: The distance from here to the shop is short.
results.example_zh_tw: 從這裡到那家店距離很近。

results.definition_en: The act of giving things out to many people.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 分發、分配；把東西分給多人。
results.example_en: The distribution of food was done at noon.
results.example_zh_tw: 中午就把食物分發完了。

results.definition_en: The act of putting a thing into parts; or one of the parts itself.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 分割、區分；把整體切成各部分，或其中一部分。
results.example_en: The cake had a clear division into eight pieces.
results.example_zh_tw: 蛋糕清楚地分成了八塊。

results.definition_en: A feeling of not being sure about a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 懷疑、疑慮；對事物把握不準的感覺。
results.example_en: I have no doubt that she will come.

results.definition_en: A liquid for taking into the mouth, like water or tea.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 飲料；可入口的液體，如水或茶。
results.example_en: I would like a cold drink, please.

results.definition_en: The act of guiding a car or other vehicle.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 駕駛；操控車輛行進。
results.example_en: Driving in the rain is hard.

results.definition_en: Very small bits of dry earth or other matter that float in the air.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 灰塵、塵土；飄浮空中的細小乾燥微粒。
results.example_en: There is dust on the books.

results.definition_en: The world we live on; or the soil under our feet.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 地球；或泥土、土壤。
results.example_en: Plants grow in the rich earth.
results.example_zh_tw: 植物在肥沃的土壤中生長。

results.definition_en: The outside line where a thing ends.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 邊緣、邊界；事物外圍的線。
results.example_en: Do not stand at the edge of the cliff.
